input.memoryNote: The Notes app list wasn't just charcuterie. There were seven other words. 'Quinoa.' 'Gnocchi.' 'Pho.' A whole parallel vocabulary self-improvement project running in silence for years. You've never once asked me how to say anything. You just go home and figure it out alone. That is somehow the most impressive and most heartbreaking thing about you.

meta.tiktokHook: I found my boyfriend's secret pronunciation list. It wasn't just charcuterie. Quinoa. Gnocchi. Pho. He has been silently self-improving for years and never once asked me for help.
meta.caption: the love language is: private preparation
meta.whyItWorks: 'Most impressive and most heartbreaking thing about you' is a line people screenshot. Relatable embarrassment + genuine sweetness = very high share rate.
